technologies.description: Node.js concepts relevant for frontend engineers

topics.notes: Debouncing controls how often a function can execute over time. When a JavaScript function is debounced with a wait time of wait milliseconds, it runs only after wait milliseconds have elapsed since the debounced function was last called.
topics.title: Debounce

topics.notes: Throttling is a technique used to control how many times a function is allowed to execute over time. When a JavaScript function is said to be throttled with a wait time of X milliseconds, it can only be invoked at most once every X milliseconds. The callback is invoked immediately and cannot be invoked again for the rest of the wait duration.
topics.title: Throttle

topics.notes: compose is a functional programming pattern that combines multiple functions into a single function, executing them from right to left. The output of each function serves as the input for the next function in line.
topics.title: Compose

topics.notes: Pipe will have similar implementation as compose but from left to right iteration of the function and calling also will be the left to right
topics.title: Pipe

topics.notes: Currying is the technique of converting a function that takes multiple arguments into a sequence of functions that each take a single argument.
topics.title: Currying
